title: Nagqu Heavy Rain
lead: Nagqu is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -4.46. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Nagqu is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The rain is expected to continue, with a high humidity level of 86% and wind speed of 4.4 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 16.6 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a high demand for heating and minimal demand for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize damage.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
